action.reasoning: Observation: 5 epochs ran in ~15 seconds, reaching val_auc=0.7452. The model is still improving. Analysis: Training is very fast (~3s/epoch). With 0.49h remaining and ~29 iterations, I can train much longer. Decision: Submit eval first to get baseline score, then train more epochs with a better architecture (larger model, more epochs).
